title: Quantum Oracle Sketching — PCA Dimension Reduction
subtitle: Top-principal-direction extraction from streaming classical data via QOS-built block encoding + QSVT spectral projector
description: End-to-end quantum PCA on toy synthetic data: stage 1 sketches the matrix-element oracle for X^T X, stage 2 builds the QSVT spectral projector onto the top-eigenvalue subspace, stage 3 reads off the top principal direction by projecting a guiding vector. Reproduces the spirit of Theorem 5 of Zhao et al. (2026).
